title: Morning Window Wander
fieldMark: Pauses at reflective glass like it might reveal a clue.
observedBehavior: Walks slowly, spots textures first, and treats every sign as a possible story hook.
tinyDetail: A good doorway can carry an entire caption.
captionSeed: Main Street Schertz is best approached at window-shopping speed.

title: Golden Hour Scout
archetype: Light chaser with errands as a cover story
fieldMark: Turns ordinary brick, pavement, and parked cars into composition practice.
observedBehavior: Takes one useful photo, then three unnecessary ones, then keeps the unnecessary ones.
tinyDetail: The best shot is usually five steps behind where you first stopped.
captionSeed: A short local walk counts as research when the light is doing this much work.

title: Saturday Note Taker
fieldMark: Carries a notes app full of fragments that make sense later.
observedBehavior: Collects signs, snippets, textures, parking facts, and one oddly specific sentence.
tinyDetail: The practical detail is often the thing people save.
captionSeed: Tiny field note from Main Street Schertz: local details age better than generic travel copy.
